calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, MARCH-20-2014 FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL IN DEPT. 525: APPELLANT SIGILLO SUPPLY IS REPRESENTED BY DANIEL PICCININI, ESQ.; RESPONDENT PHILLIP SIGILLO IS PRESENT AND IS REPRESENTED BY DANIEL DEAN, ESQ. PARTIES SIGN STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM WHICH IS FILED.

THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES; BOTH APPELLANT AND AND RESPONDENT SUBMIT DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE WHICH ARE MARKED BY THE CLERK AS EXHIBITS IN THE CAUSE. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH APPELLANT AND FOR RESPONDENT ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT.

THE COURT HEARS CLOSING STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH COUNSEL, AND THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT.525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Judgment Entered
